prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The amendments to the International Convention on Standards of Training, Certification and Watchkeeping for Seafarers (STCW) apply to Scotland as Scotland is part of the UK and the conventions related to international maritime standards affect all UK nations, including the implementation and enforcement of maritime training and certification standards.
